summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 open PR candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned. Security-sensitive PRs #81008 and #83101 are routed to central security handling. Non-security PRs are kept open as independent or related work unless an explicit maintainer decision is needed.

actions.reason: Standalone useful PR with unresolved validation; keep open for maintainer review.
Potentially useful standalone availability fix; not closable from inventory evidence.
Related candidate work for hydrated issue #64892; keep open.
Related test PR with unresolved review/proof state; keep open rather than close as duplicate or superseded.
Security-boundary hook change; route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Standalone useful ACP fix with missing proof; keep open.
Open maintainer-owned PR appears related to an already-fixed issue, but active maintainer follow-up blocks automated closure.
Standalone compatibility fix with failing proof/checks; keep open.
Privacy/encrypted-backup work is security-sensitive and broad; route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Small useful standalone PR needing maintainer/rebase follow-up; keep open.

needs_human: #88947 requires maintainer judgment before any superseded/close action because the linked issue #88933 is fixed on main but the PR has active maintainer ownership and proof follow-up.
